attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WI_UR.TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
 WI_UR.RPO_FLG                       ,
 WI_UR.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
 WI_WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
 WI_UR.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
 WI_UR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 WI_UR.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
 WI_UR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
 WI_UR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 WI_UR.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
 WI_UR.CORP_FLG                      ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
 WI_UR.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
 WI_UR.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
 WI_UR.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
 WI_UR.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
 WI_UR.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
 RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT                    ,
 WI_UR.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
 WI_UR.HOLD_FLG                      ,
 WI_UR.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
 WI_UR.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
 WI_UR.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
 WI_UR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 WI_UR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 WI_UR.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
 WI_UR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
 WI_UR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
 WI_UR.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
 WI_UR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
 WI_UR.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
 WI_UR.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
 WI_UR.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
 WI_UR.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
 WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
 WI_UR.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
 WI_UR.ATO_NAME                      ,
 WI_UR.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
 WI_UR.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
 WI_UR.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
 WI_UR.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
 WI_UR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
 WI_UR.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
 WI_UR.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
 WI_UR.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
 WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
  WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           , 
 WI_WF.ACTUAL_WATERFALL_ST_DT        , 
 WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
 WI_WF.BDOM                          ,
 --CASE WHEN  WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME   IN ('monthly billing','Prepaid Term') THEN  ROUND((NEW_PRED- WI_WF.BDOM)/30.41)+1  ELSE WI_WF.BILLING_CYCLE+1 END AS new_Billing_cycle ,

 WI_WF.BILLING_CYCLE, 
 WI_WF.CAL_BDOM                      ,
  CASE WHEN  WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME   IN ('monthly billing','Prepaid Term') THEN 
  CASE
  WHEN WI_WF.PRED_BDOM  BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  THEN  WI_WF.PRED_BDOM  
  WHEN WI_WF.ACTUAL_WATERFALL_ST_DT BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  THEN WI_WF.ACTUAL_WATERFALL_ST_DT
  ELSE
  WI_WF.PRED_BDOM END
  ELSE 
  WI_WF.PRED_BDOM
  END                NEW_PRED ,
 WI_WF.WATERFALL_DUR                 ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE         ,
 WI_WF.NO_OF_DAYS                    ,
 WI_WF.WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT       ,
 WI_WF.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
 WI_WF.MONTH_AGE                     ,
 WI_WF.DEPTH                         ,
 WI_WF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID            ,
 (WI_WF.REM_TERM/30.41667) AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT ,
 WI_UR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 WI_UR.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
  WI_UR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT ,              
 WI_UR.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
 ,WI_UR.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG
 ,WI_UR.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF1 WI_WF
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF_AT WI_UR
 ON WI_UR.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=WI_WF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
 ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         =WI_WF.FISCAL_MTH  
where WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME  not in  ('Quarterly Billing','Annual Billing')
--AND WI_UR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME='Daily Rates' 
AND WI_WF.ACTIVE_FLG='Y'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
 WI_UR.TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
 WI_UR.RPO_FLG                       ,
 WI_UR.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
 WI_WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
 WI_UR.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
 WI_UR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 WI_UR.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
 WI_UR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
 WI_UR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 WI_UR.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
 WI_UR.CORP_FLG                      ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
 WI_UR.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
 WI_UR.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
 WI_UR.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
 WI_UR.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
 WI_UR.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
 RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT                    ,
 WI_UR.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
 WI_UR.HOLD_FLG                      ,
 WI_UR.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
 WI_UR.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
 WI_UR.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
 WI_UR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 WI_UR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 WI_UR.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
 WI_UR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
 WI_UR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
 WI_UR.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
 WI_UR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
 WI_UR.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
 WI_UR.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
 WI_UR.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
 WI_UR.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
 WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
 WI_UR.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
 WI_UR.ATO_NAME                      ,
 WI_UR.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
 WI_UR.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
 WI_UR.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
 WI_UR.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
 WI_UR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
 WI_UR.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
 WI_UR.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
 WI_UR.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
 WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
 
 WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
WI_WF.ACTUAL_WATERFALL_ST_DT        ,  
 
 WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
 WI_WF.BDOM                          ,
 
--CASE WHEN  WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME   IN ('monthly billing','Prepaid Term') THEN   ROUND((NEW_PRED- WI_WF.BDOM)/30.41)+1  ELSE WI_WF.BILLING_CYCLE+1 END AS new_Billing_cycle,
WI_WF.BILLING_CYCLE,
 WI_WF.CAL_BDOM,
  CASE WHEN  WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME   IN ('monthly billing','Prepaid Term') THEN 
  CASE
  WHEN WI_WF.PRED_BDOM  BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  THEN  WI_WF.PRED_BDOM  
  WHEN WI_WF.ACTUAL_WATERFALL_ST_DT BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  THEN WI_WF.ACTUAL_WATERFALL_ST_DT
  ELSE
  WI_WF.PRED_BDOM END
  ELSE 
  WI_WF.PRED_BDOM
  END                NEW_PRED ,
 WI_WF.WATERFALL_DUR                 ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE         ,
 WI_WF.NO_OF_DAYS                    ,
 WI_WF.WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT       ,
 WI_WF.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
 WI_WF.MONTH_AGE                     ,
 WI_WF.DEPTH                         ,
 WI_WF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID            ,
 (WI_WF.REM_TERM/30.41667) AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT ,
 WI_UR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 WI_UR.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
  WI_UR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT ,              
 WI_UR.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
,WI_UR.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG
,WI_UR.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG /*Q2FY23:PPMT December Release-DPDE-9172*/
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF1 WI_WF
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF_AT WI_UR
 ON WI_UR.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=WI_WF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
 ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         =WI_WF.FISCAL_MTH  
where WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME    in  ('Quarterly Billing','Annual Billing')
AND WI_UR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ('Immediate','Immediate - NRST')
AND WI_WF.ACTIVE_FLG='Y'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
 WI_UR.TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
 WI_UR.RPO_FLG                       ,
 WI_UR.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
 WI_WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MTH                    ,
 WI_UR.SRC_ENTITY                    ,
 WI_UR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
 WI_UR.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
 WI_UR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 WI_UR.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
 WI_UR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
 WI_UR.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
 WI_UR.CORP_FLG                      ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
 WI_UR.CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
 WI_UR.ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
 WI_UR.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
 WI_UR.FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
 WI_UR.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
 WI_UR.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
 RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT                    ,
 WI_UR.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
 WI_UR.HOLD_FLG                      ,
 WI_UR.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
 WI_UR.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
 WI_UR.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
 WI_UR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 WI_UR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 WI_UR.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
 WI_UR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
 WI_UR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
 WI_UR.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
 WI_UR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
 WI_UR.DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
 WI_UR.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
 WI_UR.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
 WI_UR.RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
 WI_UR.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
 WI_UR.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
 WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
 WI_UR.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
 WI_UR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
 WI_UR.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
 WI_UR.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
 WI_UR.ATO_NAME                      ,
 WI_UR.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
 WI_UR.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
 WI_UR.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
 WI_UR.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
 WI_UR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
 WI_UR.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
 WI_UR.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
 WI_UR.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
 --WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
 WI_WF.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT        , 
 WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,  
 WI_WF.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT  as ACTUAL_WATERFALL_ST_DT,      
 WI_UR.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
 WI_WF.PRED_BDOM                          ,
 
WI_WF.BILLING_CYCLE  AS BILLING_CYCLE,
WI_WF.PRED_BDOM                      ,
WI_WF.PRED_BDOM  NEW_PRED ,
 WI_WF.TOT_DUR   AS WATERFALL_DUR              ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       ,
 WI_WF.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE         ,
 WI_WF.DUR AS NO_OF_DAYS                    ,
 WI_WF.WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT       ,
 WI_WF.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
 WI_WF.MONTH_AGE                     ,
 WI_WF.DEPTH                         ,
 WI_WF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID            ,
 (WI_WF.REM_TERM/30.41667) AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT ,
 WI_UR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 WI_UR.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
 WI_UR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT ,              
 WI_UR.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
 ,WI_UR.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG
 ,WI_UR.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG /*Q2FY23:PPMT December Release-DPDE-9172*/
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_QBAB_WF WI_WF
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF_AT WI_UR
 ON WI_UR.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=WI_WF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
 ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         =WI_WF.FISCAL_MTH  
where WI_UR.BILLING_MODEL_NAME    in  ('Quarterly Billing','Annual Billing')
AND WI_UR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ('Daily Rates','Daily Rates - NRST','Immediate','Immediate - NRST')--JR:added as fix for Imm portion
AND WI_WF.ACTIVE_FLG='Y'

SELECT
PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
FISCAL_MTH                    ,
CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
BDOM                          ,
BILLING_CYCLE                 ,
CAL_BDOM                      ,
PRED_BDOM                     ,
WATERFALL_DUR                 ,
FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       ,
FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE         ,
NO_OF_DAYS                    ,
WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT       ,
DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID            ,
MONTH_AGE                     ,
DEPTH
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF1
WHERE 1=2

SELECT 
TRANSACTION_TYPE              
--,CASE WHEN WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM < DATE AND WIUN.CONTRACT_END_DTM > DATE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END RPO_FLG                        
,WIUN.RPO_FLG AS RPO_FLG                        
,WIUN.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          
,WIUN.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          
,WIUN.FISCAL_MTH                    
,WIUN.SRC_ENTITY                    
,WIUN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,WIUN.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,WIUN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WIUN.WEB_ORDER_ID                  
,WIUN.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WIUN.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WIUN.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         
,WIUN.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WIUN.SERVICE_FLG                   
,WIUN.CORP_FLG                      
,WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM            
,WIUN.CONTRACT_END_DTM              
,WIUN.CONTRACT_TERM                 
,WIUN.CONTRACT_NUM                  
,WIUN.ERP_DEAL_ID                   
,WIUN.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               
,WIUN.FHI_BNI_FLG                   
,WIUN.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               
,WIUN.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               
,WIUN.PROCESS_DT                    
,WIUN.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             
,WIUN.HOLD_FLG                      
,WIUN.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                
,WIUN.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      
,WIUN.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        
,WIUN.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WIUN.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WIUN.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WIUN.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        
,WIUN.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WIUN.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,WIUN.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      
,WIUN.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,WIUN.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            
,WIUN.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  
,WIUN.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT 
,WIUN.DD_FB_SS_CD                   
,WIUN.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     
,WIUN.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           
,WIUN.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           
,WIUN.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        
,WIUN.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WIUN.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WIUN.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WIUN.RENEWAL_CNT                   
,WIUN.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     
,WIUN.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 
,WIUN.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            
,WIUN.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         
,WIUN.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD 
,WIUN.ATTRIBUTION_PCT                        
,WIUN.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                
,WIUN.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                
,WIUN.ATO_NAME                      
,NULL AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,NULL AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  
,NULL AS DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   
,NULL  AS DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     
,COALESCE(OPL_AC.ACCOUNTING_RULE,EL.ACCOUNTING_RULE,NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'Daily Rates') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
,EL.DURATION AS DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT           
,COALESCE(AVG_TM.AVG_TERM,21) AS DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT                                  
,'1900-01-01' AS DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            
,CAST(CONTRACT_START_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_WATERFALL_START_DT            
,CAST(CONTRACT_END_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_WATERFALL_END_DT              
,CAST(CASE WHEN ROUND(CAST((CAST(CAST(  DV_WATERFALL_END_DT AS DATE) -  CAST(DV_WATERFALL_START_DT AS DATE) AS INTEGER)) AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) ) =0 THEN 1
ELSE ROUND(CAST((CAST(CAST( DV_WATERFALL_END_DT AS DATE) - CAST(DV_WATERFALL_START_DT AS DATE) AS INTEGER))+1 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) ) END AS INTEGER) DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT                  
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WIUN.sales_order_line_key) AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID 
,COALESCE(MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,'=')
,WIUN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
,WIUN.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY
,WIUN.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,WIUN.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
,WIUN.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG /* ADDED AS PART OF SEP ATHENA REL*/
,WIUN.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,WIUN.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG AS DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_SBP_GROSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE WIUN

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS NP
ON NP.ITEM_KEY=WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY 

/*
LEFT JOIN (SELECT MIN(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,MAX(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,SALES_ORDER_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE GROUP BY 3) NSOL
ON WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,PROJ.AS_PROJECT_ACTUAL_START_DT,PROJ.AS_PROJECT_ACTUAL_FINISH_DT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.MT_AS_PROJ_TO_SALES_ORDER_LINK PROJSO
ON CAST(NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(30))=PROJSO.SO_NUMBER
INNER JOIN $$ASBIVWDB.MT_AS_PROJECT PROJ
ON PROJ.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD=PROJSO.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY ORDER BY PROJ.END_TV_DT DESC)=1
) PROJDT
ON WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY=PROJDT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
*/
--ACC RULE DERIVATION
LEFT JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ACCOUNTING_RULE OPL_AC
ON OPL_AC.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = WIUN.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
AND OPL_AC.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE = WIUN.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM
AND OPL_AC.PRODUCT_KEY = WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
AND OPL_AC.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = WIUN.PRODUCT_KEY

/*
LEFT JOIN (SELECT SKU, ACCOUNTING_RULE,DURATION 
 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_PROD_SUBSCR_SKU WHERE END_DATE IS NULL)EL 
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=EL.SKU
*/

LEFT JOIN (SELECT EL.SKU,/*BIZ_DEF_TERM,*/EL.ACCOUNTING_RULE,EL.DURATION 
   FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_PROD_SUBSCR_SKU EL
   INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCFIR_PROD_SUBSCR_SKU ST --to ignore the active records that are closed in src system
   ON ST.SKU_ID=EL.SKU_ID     WHERE ST.END_DATE IS NULL )EL 
  ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=EL.SKU


LEFT JOIN (
SEL DISTINCT ITEM_KEY,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM 
WHERE ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ( 'IMMEDIATE' , 'DAILY RATES' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY ITEM_KEY ORDER BY  SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ASC , EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC )=1
)NII
ON WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY =NII.ITEM_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DFR_GROSS_UNBILLED_AVG_TERM AVG_TM
ON AVG_TM.BUSINESS_UNIT=NP.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID 
AND COALESCE(AVG_TM.END_DATE ,DATE)>=DATE -- coalesce to qualify one active record per BU

LEFT JOIN (
   SEL   SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG  FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKGS_MEASURE_ORDER_MTH WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD    ='XAAS'
AND CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG NOT IN ('=')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT DESC,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG DESC)=1
   ) MSR
  ON MSR.SALES_ORDER_KEY  =WIUN.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           =WIUN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
  AND MSR.PRODUCT_KEY                   =WIUN.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY 

WHERE 1=1
AND WIUN.TRANSACTION_TYPE='SBP'
/*AND WIUN.CONTRACT_START_DTM IS NOT NULL*/

SELECT
PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
FISCAL_MTH                    ,
CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
BDOM                          ,
BILLING_CYCLE                 ,
CAL_BDOM                      ,
PRED_BDOM                     ,
WATERFALL_DUR                 ,
FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       ,
FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE         ,
NO_OF_DAYS                    ,
WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT       ,
DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID            ,
MONTH_AGE                     ,
DEPTH
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF1
WHERE 1=2

SELECT
PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
FISCAL_MTH                    ,
CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
BDOM                          ,
BILLING_CYCLE                 ,
CAL_BDOM                      ,
PRED_BDOM                     ,
WATERFALL_DUR                 ,
FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       ,
FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE         ,
NO_OF_DAYS                    ,
WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT       ,
DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID            ,
MONTH_AGE                     ,
DEPTH
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF1
WHERE 1=2

SELECT
'SBP_ACCRUALS' TRANSACTION_TYPE              
,WF_AT.RPO_FLG                       
,CAST((WI_ACRL.ACCRUAL_AMOUNT * (WF_AT.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT/100.000000) * COALESCE(CAST(WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16)))) AS DECIMAL(26,7))AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT         
,WF_AT.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          
,WF_AT.FISCAL_MTH                    
,WF_AT.SRC_ENTITY                    
,WF_AT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WF_AT.WEB_ORDER_ID                  
,WF_AT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WF_AT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WF_AT.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         
,WF_AT.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WF_AT.SERVICE_FLG                   
,WF_AT.CORP_FLG                      
,WF_AT.CONTRACT_START_DTM            
,WF_AT.CONTRACT_END_DTM              
,WF_AT.CONTRACT_TERM                 
,WF_AT.CONTRACT_NUM                  
,WF_AT.ERP_DEAL_ID                   
,WF_AT.AUTO_RELEASE_DT               
,WF_AT.FHI_BNI_FLG                   
,WF_AT.CISCO_BOOKED_DT               
,WF_AT.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               
,WF_AT.PROCESS_DT                    
,WF_AT.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             
,WF_AT.HOLD_FLG                      
,WF_AT.EARLY_SHIP_FLG                
,WF_AT.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      
,WF_AT.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        
,WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WF_AT.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WF_AT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        
,WF_AT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WF_AT.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         
,0 AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      
,WF_AT.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,WF_AT.PL_CONVERSION_RATE            
,WF_AT.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  
,WF_AT.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT 
,WF_AT.DD_FB_SS_CD                   
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           
,WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           
,WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD
,WF_AT.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WF_AT.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WF_AT.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         
,WF_AT.RENEWAL_CNT                   
,WF_AT.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     
,WF_AT.OFFER_TYPE_CD                 
,WF_AT.BILLING_MODEL_NAME            
,WF_AT.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         
,WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           
,WF_AT.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               
,WF_AT.SRC_CANCEL_DTM                
,WF_AT.CHARGE_TYPE_CD                
,WF_AT.ATO_NAME                      
,WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,WF_AT.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  
,WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   
,WF_AT.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     
,WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,WF_AT.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT 
,WF_AT.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       
,WF_AT.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            
,WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         
,WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           
,WF_AT.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    
,(SELECT MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID) FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF_AT) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WF_AT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID       
,WF_AT.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          
,WF_AT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD     
,WF_AT.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY             
,WF_AT.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
,WF_AT.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
,WF_AT.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG 
,WF_AT.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,WF_AT.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG  /*Q2FY23:PPMT December Release-DPDE-9172*/ 
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_WF_AT WF_AT
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACRL_SUM_DATA WI_ACRL
 ON WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = WI_ACRL.REF_CODE AND WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM = WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
 AND WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AND WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY AND WI_ACRL.FLEXUP_FLAG =WF_AT.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG /* ADDED AS PART OF Q1Y22 SEP ATHENA REL*/
/* INNER JOIN (SELECT SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID, BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM, PRODUCT_KEY ,ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SUM(DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SBP_GROSS_UNBILLED_REVENUE 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) WI_SC
 ON WI_SC.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID = WI_ACRL.REF_CODE AND WI_SC.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM = WI_ACRL.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE
 AND WI_SC.PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY AND WI_SC.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = WI_ACRL.PRODUCT_KEY */
  WHERE TRANSACTION_TYPE='SBP'
  AND WI_ACRL.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG='Y' 
  AND WF_AT.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ('Daily Rates','Daily Rates - NRST')
/* QUALIFY  Row_Number() Over (PARTITION BY WF_AT.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID ,WF_AT.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,WF_AT.PRODUCT_KEY,WF_AT.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,WI_SC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ORDER BY FISCAL_MTH ASC)=1 */
